title: SLO Configuration
description: Service Level Objective targets for production monitoring (B16-P4)

slos.name: Public Demo Uptime
slos.description: 99% uptime for public demo tier over a rolling 30-day window

slos.name: Paid Tenant Uptime
slos.description: 99.5% uptime for paid tenants over a rolling 30-day window

slos.name: Internal Uptime
slos.description: 99.9% uptime for internal services over a rolling 30-day window

slos.name: Search Latency (p95)
slos.description: p95 search response time under 1.5 seconds over a 7-day window

slos.name: Error Rate
slos.description: Error rate below 1% over a 7-day window
